sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Will Boot Barn (BOOT) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
feed.summary: Boot Barn (BOOT) is showing strong potential to beat its next earnings estimates, building on a history of exceeding expectations in previous quarters. With a positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +3.98% and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), the company is well-positioned for another positive surprise. Its next earnings report is anticipated on February 4, 2026.

feed.title: Cheche Group Announces Receipt of Notification Letter from Nasdaq
feed.summary: Cheche Group Inc. (NASDAQ: CCG) announced receipt of a notification letter from Nasdaq indicating non-compliance with the minimum bid price requirement, as its Class A ordinary shares have traded below US$1.00 for 30 consecutive business days. The company has a 180-calendar-day compliance period, until July 13, 2026, to regain compliance, with no immediate impact on its listing or business operations. Cheche Group intends to monitor its share price and explore options to meet the Nasdaq requirement.

feed.title: Cogent Biosciences Announces Anticipated 2026 Commercial and Clinical Milestones for Bezuclastinib and Precision Therapies Portfolio
feed.summary: Cogent Biosciences has announced its anticipated commercial and clinical milestones for 2026, focusing on bezuclastinib and its precision therapies portfolio. Key plans include submitting New Drug Applications (NDAs) for bezuclastinib in multiple indications like NonAdvSM, AdvSM, and GIST, with potential commercial launch in the second half of 2026. The company also expects to submit Investigational New Drug (IND) applications for novel pan-KRAS(ON) and JAK2 V617F inhibitors, supported by a strong financial position of approximately $900 million.

feed.title: PTx Winter Conference Highlights Practical Ag Innovations
feed.summary: AGCO's PTx division is hosting its first annual Winter Conference under the PTx brand in Tremont, Illinois, from January 20-23, 2026. This premier event will showcase next-generation precision agriculture technologies, including water management, autonomy planting, and spraying innovations, aiming to provide practical solutions and educational insights for farmers, media, and investors. The conference will also feature exclusive research from Precision Planting's PTI Farm and integrate PTx technology with Fendt products in interactive sessions.

feed.title: American strategic investment (NYC) purchases shares worth $37,487 By Investing.com
feed.summary: American Strategic Investment Co. (NYSE:NYC) saw several ten percent owners acquire Class A common stock totaling $37,487 between January 7 and January 12, 2026. These purchases occurred while NYC shares traded significantly below their InvestingPro Fair Value, suggesting potential undervaluation despite the company's weak financial health score. The company recently reported a Q3 2025 GAAP net gain of $35.8 million, a significant turnaround from a prior net loss, and has had its business plan to regain compliance with NYSE listing standards accepted.

feed.title: Dover's Hillphoenix Boosts Portfolio With AdvansorUltra Launch
feed.summary: Dover Corporation's subsidiary Hillphoenix has launched AdvansorUltra, a new standardized industrial CO2 rack, expanding its presence in the rapidly growing industrial refrigeration market. The AdvansorUltra offers significant capacity and temperature range flexibility, with features designed for specialized applications and easy maintenance. This strategic move aligns with Hillphoenix's focus on transcritical CO2 refrigeration adoption across various industries.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities Securities Fraud Class
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has initiated a securities class action lawsuit against Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE), urging investors with substantial losses to file lead plaintiff applications by January 26, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Alexandria failed to disclose material information between January 27, 2025, and October 27, 2025, leading to a 19% stock decline after the company announced lower-than-expected Q3 2025 results and a significant real estate impairment charge. Investors affected by the stock drop can contact KSF to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan stock tags new high as Wall Street lifts targets on copper, with earnings next
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) shares reached a new 52-week high, closing 1.1% higher at $59.34, buoyed by tight copper supply and positive analyst revisions from Wells Fargo and Citi. Attention now shifts to the upcoming dividend record date and the company's Q4 earnings call on January 22, where investors will seek updated guidance on production and costs. The stock's performance remains highly sensitive to copper prices, Chinese demand, and interest rate outlooks.

feed.title: F5, Inc. Securities Fraud Class Action Result of Data Accessibility: Skip TopNav F5, Inc. Securities Fraud Class Action Result of Data Breach and Stock Decline - Investors may Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq, at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has announced a securities class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. (NasdaqGS: FFIV) for investors who purchased securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that F5 failed to disclose material information, leading to a significant stock decline after the company announced poor Q4 2025 results and a security breach involving its BIG-IP product. Investors with substantial losses are encouraged to contact KSF by February 17, 2026, to file lead plaintiff applications.

feed.title: IHG Names McDonald's Exec Manfredi AI Head
feed.summary: IHG Hotels & Resorts has appointed Wei Manfredi, former McDonald's and Google executive, as Senior Vice President of AI and Architecture, effective immediately. Manfredi will be responsible for guiding IHG's AI strategy, strengthening its technical and data architecture, and fostering technology partnerships. This hiring reflects IHG's investment in technology leadership to benefit owners, guests, and teams, building on their existing AI applications in contact centers, guest services, and travel planning.

feed.title: Prologis Stock In Focus: Quietly Beating The Market While REITs Struggle
feed.summary: Prologis (PLD), a major industrial REIT, has outperformed the market and many other real estate sectors despite challenges like higher interest rates, driven by resilient demand for logistics space. The stock has shown solid one-year returns and positive recent trading, supported by favorable analyst views and a strong balance sheet. Investors are increasingly recognizing Prologis's quality in the REIT universe, viewing it as a core holding for exposure to global logistics infrastructure.

feed.title: Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. I (NASDAQ:BACQ) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. I (NASDAQ:BACQ) experienced a significant 78.4% drop in short interest during December, falling to 14,486 shares as of December 31st. This leaves only 0.1% of shares sold short, with a short-interest ratio of 0.1 days. Analysts maintain a "Sell" rating for the stock, despite some institutional investors like Meteora Capital and Berkley W.R. increasing their positions.

feed.title: Ford CEO says trade deal with Mexico and Canada is 'critical' for industry
feed.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley emphasized the critical importance of the North American free trade deal for the auto industry, despite former President Trump's recent dismissal of it as "irrelevant." The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) is up for review this year, and Ford sees Canada, Mexico, and the U.S. as an integrated manufacturing system requiring revisions to the deal. Additionally, both Jim Farley and Executive Chair Bill Ford highlighted affordability as a major concern for 2026, with plans to introduce more entry-level vehicle options, including a $30,000 electric pickup in 2027.

feed.title: VFMO: Reasonably Valued And Very Diversified Momentum ETF (BATS:VFMO)
feed.summary: The Vanguard U.S. Momentum Factor ETF (VFMO) offers broad diversification across 627 companies, focusing on technology and minimizing company-specific risk. While it has recently outperformed mid-cap benchmarks and the S&P 500, its long-term performance is average among momentum ETFs. VFMO is notable for its low top-10 concentration and reasonable valuation, making it a balanced option for investors seeking diversification.

feed.title: Ciena (NYSE:CIEN) Director Sells $2,642,514.10 in Stock
feed.summary: Ciena (NYSE:CIEN) Director Patrick Gallagher sold 11,618 shares of the company's stock for over $2.6 million, reducing his stake by 18.8%. This insider sale comes as Ciena shares rallied after beating quarterly earnings expectations and analysts raised price targets with a consensus of $237.50. Despite the insider sale, institutional ownership remains high at nearly 92%, with significant recent purchases from large firms, indicating strong institutional confidence in the stock.

feed.title: The Truth About Northern Trust Corp.: Why Wall Street Quietly Loves This ‘Boring’ Stock
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corp. (NTRS) is portrayed as a stable, "boring" but profitable investment often overlooked by mainstream investors. The article highlights its focus on managing wealth for institutions and high-net-worth individuals, its consistent dividend, and its resilience in volatile markets. While not flashy, NTRS is presented as a valuable long-term asset for serious investors seeking stability and wealth preservation.

feed.title: Arcellx CMO Heery sells $487k in shares
feed.summary: Arcellx's Chief Medical Officer, Christopher Heery, sold 7,437 shares of common stock worth approximately $487,212 on January 13, 2026. This transaction was primarily to cover tax obligations. Heery now directly owns 29,631 shares, following a recent acquisition through restricted stock units.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Biogen (BIIB) Could Change Following EU Approval Of High‑Dose Spinraza Regimen
feed.summary: Biogen has received European Commission marketing authorization for a high-dose SPINRAZA regimen for spinal muscular atrophy. This approval is based on positive DEVOTE Phase 2/3 trial data demonstrating significant motor function gains. While this strengthens Biogen's near-term investment case, the company's future largely depends on new neurology and rare disease drug launches, especially LEQEMBI, and managing pricing pressures on high-cost therapies.

feed.title: Coca-Cola stock rises as KO sets Feb. 10 earnings date; what investors watch next
feed.summary: Coca-Cola (KO) shares rose 1% to $71.24 after the company announced its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings release for Feb. 10, with an investor call at 8:30 a.m. ET. CEO-elect Henrique Braun and CFO John Murphy will also speak at the CAGNY conference on Feb. 17. Investors are paying close attention to these events for insights into demand, pricing, costs, and the company's 2026 priorities, especially amidst global discussions around "health taxes" on sugary drinks.

feed.title: BriaCell Raises $30 Million Through Public Offering of Units and Listed Warrants
feed.summary: BriaCell Therapeutics has successfully priced a $30 million public offering of units, with each unit comprising common shares or pre-funded warrants and one warrant, at $5.59 per unit. The warrants will be listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol BCTXL starting January 14, 2026. Proceeds from the offering will be allocated to working capital, general corporate needs, and advancing the company's immunotherapy pipeline.

feed.title: Western Digital stock in focus as WDC sets Jan. 29 earnings date and storage names brace for a busy week
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC) is scheduled to report its fiscal second-quarter earnings on January 29, placing its stock and the broader storage sector under investor scrutiny. This announcement follows heightened interest in storage hardware as a potential bottleneck for AI data centers, a sentiment echoed by Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang. Competitor Seagate (STX) will release its earnings two days prior on January 27, giving the market an early look at demand and pricing trends in the tightly concentrated hard disk drive market.

feed.title: Niton adds to handheld analyzer line
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific's Niton brand has introduced the XL5e X-ray fluorescence (XRF) analyzer, expanding its line of handheld elemental analysis devices. Designed for precision in industries like scrap metal recycling, the XL5e offers enhanced performance on light elements, advanced calibration stability, and a compact design. It is built for rugged environments and provides fast, lab-quality results for various materials, including aluminum and copper alloys.

feed.title: CVS Health Corp.: How a Pharmacy Giant Is Rebuilding the Front Door to U.S. Healthcare
feed.summary: CVS Health Corp. is transforming from a drugstore chain into a vertically integrated healthcare platform, offering a comprehensive ecosystem of retail pharmacies, clinics, insurance, PBM services, and digital health tools. This strategy aims to provide coordinated care and lower friction for consumers, positioning CVS as a leading "front door" to healthcare. The company's competitive edge lies in its vertical integration, vast physical footprint, tight integration of benefits and care delivery, and extensive data liquidity, which collectively impact its stock valuation as investors assess its ability to reduce costs and improve patient outcomes.

feed.title: BriaCell Therapeutics Announces Pricing of $30 million Public Offering
feed.summary: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp. announced the pricing of a best-efforts public offering of 5,366,726 units at $5.59 per unit, aiming to raise approximately $30 million. Each unit consists of one common share (or pre-funded warrant) and one warrant, with warrants expected to trade on Nasdaq under "BCTXL". The company plans to use the net proceeds for working capital, general corporate purposes, and advancing its business objectives, with the offering anticipated to close on January 15, 2026.

feed.title: Assessing Wix.com (WIX) Valuation After Office Mandate And Weaker Earnings Sentiment
feed.summary: Wix.com (WIX) is under scrutiny due to a new five-day office workweek mandate, weaker earnings sentiment, and a recent sell rating, despite its stock trading at a reported 41.35% intrinsic discount. The company's fair value is estimated at US$164, supported by AI-powered feature rollouts driving user monetization and price optimization. However, potential risks include strong AI competitors and sustained high AI and Base44 spending.

feed.title: Barclays Maintains Mid-America Apartment Communities Inc(MAA.US) With Hold Rating, Raises Target Price to $144
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Richard Hightower has reiterated a hold rating on Mid-America Apartment Communities Inc (MAA.US) and increased the target price from $142 to $144. According to TipRanks, Hightower has a 35.9% success rate and a -2.8% average return over the past year. This report emphasizes that the information is for educational purposes only and not investment advice.

feed.title: ITW Schedules Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Webcast
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) announced its plans to release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 results on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. CST. Following the release, the company will host an earnings webcast at 9:00 a.m. CST. Details for accessing the webcast and a conference call, along with replay information, were provided for investors and interested parties.

feed.title: ACRES Commercial Realty (NYSE:ACR) Major Shareholder Sells $92,142.78 in Stock
feed.summary: Eagle Point Credit Management, a major shareholder in ACRES Commercial Realty (NYSE:ACR), recently sold 3,702 shares for a total of $92,142.78, reducing its ownership by 0.97%. This sale is part of a series of transactions by Eagle Point Credit Management in December and January, totaling approximately $643,000. Despite the sales by a major shareholder, ACRES Commercial Realty's board has approved a $7.5 million stock buyback program, indicating management believes the stock is undervalued.

feed.title: Fed signs off on Fifth Third Bank's $10.9B bid to buy Comerica
feed.summary: The Federal Reserve has approved Fifth Third Bancorp's $10.9 billion acquisition of Comerica Inc. The deal, expected to close on February 1, 2026, will create the ninth-largest bank in the U.S. and lead to the closure of 76 branches in Michigan, mainly in Oakland County.

feed.title: Verizon (VZ) stock slides as FCC eases phone-unlocking rule, earnings next on deck
feed.summary: Verizon's stock (VZ) dropped 2.08% as the FCC eased a phone-unlocking rule, sparking debate between industry and consumer advocates. The company faces scrutiny ahead of its Q4 2025 earnings report on January 30th, with broader market trends and a Federal Reserve meeting also influencing telecom shares. The new FCC waiver aims to combat device theft but is criticized by consumer groups for potentially limiting customer mobility.

feed.title: Cintas Corp.: How a Boring-Sounding Uniform Giant Quietly Became a Mission?Critical Service Platform
feed.summary: Cintas Corp. has evolved beyond a uniform supplier into a data-driven, safety-centric service platform essential for North America's frontline workforce. The article details its core services including uniform rental, facility services, safety and first aid, and fire protection, highlighting how these integrated offerings create recurring revenue and strong customer stickiness. It also examines Cintas' competitive landscape and how its strategic positioning as a risk-management partner contributes to its strong market valuation.

feed.title: Ford Motor Company unveils new Bronco RTR, Carhartt collab ahead of Detroit Auto Show on Tuesday, Jan. 13 2026.
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company unveiled its new Bronco RTR and a Carhartt collaboration during an event held at Huntington Place in Detroit, ahead of the Detroit Auto Show on January 13, 2026. The event featured appearances by Ford CEO Jim Farley and Carhartt CEO Linda Hubbard, showcasing various Bronco models, including a Baja 1,000 winning race Bronco and Search and Rescue-styled vehicles.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group stock tests new highs as investors bet the cruise boom is far from over
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group's stock is reaching new highs, driven by strong booking trends, improved pricing, and a robust post-pandemic travel recovery. Investors are showing confidence in the global travel sector, with positive analyst commentary and institutional buying supporting the bullish sentiment. The company's future prospects look strong due to new ship introductions and effective management of operating costs, though macro headwinds and valuation risks remain.

feed.title: BriaCell Therapeutics Announces Pricing of $30 million Public Offering
feed.summary: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp. has announced the pricing of a public offering expected to raise approximately $30 million. The offering includes 5,366,726 units, each consisting of one common share (or pre-funded warrant) and one warrant, priced at $5.59 per unit. The net proceeds will be used for working capital, general corporate purposes, and advancing the company's business objectives.

feed.title: Will AI‑Driven Demand, Piper Sandler Upgrade and Fortinet Alliance Change Arista Networks' (ANET) Narrative
feed.summary: Piper Sandler upgraded Arista Networks (ANET) due to improving business visibility from enterprise IT spending and AI-driven demand. A collaboration with Fortinet on a Secure AI Data Center solution further highlights Arista's role in integrated networking for AI infrastructure. However, the article also notes the risk of customer concentration with a few hyperscale and AI clients driving a significant portion of revenue.

feed.title: Delisting of Securities from The Nasdaq Stock Market
feed.summary: The Nasdaq Stock Market announced the delisting of securities for several companies, including Four Leaf Acquisition Corporation, Advent Technologies Holdings, Inc., and iRobot Corporation. These companies' securities had been suspended and had not traded on Nasdaq since various dates in late 2025 and early 2026. The announcement provides a comprehensive list of affected entities and refers to Nasdaq's Rule 5800 Series for delisting governance.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Avino Silver & Gold Mines (TSX:ASM) After A 7x Surge?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Avino Silver & Gold Mines (TSX:ASM) after its significant stock surge, using both Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio analyses. The DCF model suggests the company is undervalued, while the P/E ratio indicates it is overvalued compared to industry averages and its proprietary "Fair Ratio." The article also introduces "Narratives" as a way for investors to formulate their own valuation based on specific assumptions.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) After Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Gains?
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) has seen significant share price gains over multiple years, but a recent valuation analysis by Simply Wall St suggests it may be overvalued. Using an Excess Returns model, ICE is estimated to be 45.2% overvalued with an intrinsic value of $114.82 compared to its current share price of $166. Additionally, its current P/E ratio of 30.1x is higher than its calculated "Fair Ratio" of 16.9x, further indicating potential overvaluation according to this framework.

feed.title: ZNB Stock Price and Chart — NASDAQ:ZNB
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of Zeta Network Group (ZNB) stock, including its current price, market capitalization, key financial stats, and performance metrics. It details the company's business in entertainment technology and artificial intelligence, and offers technical analysis indicators. The content also addresses frequently asked questions about ZNB's stock performance and financial health.

feed.title: South Plains Financial, Inc. to Release Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results on January 26, 2026
feed.summary: South Plains Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ:SPFI) will release its fourth quarter 2025 financial results after market close on January 26, 2026, followed by a conference call and webcast at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. The company, which operates City Bank, will discuss its performance and offer a replay of the call until February 9, 2026. Recent data shows insider sales of SPFI stock, institutional investor activity, Q3 2025 revenues of $54.2 million, and analyst ratings with a median price target of $44.0.

feed.title: Diretor da Alumis compra ações no valor de US$ 9,9 milhões
feed.summary: O diretor Srinivas Akkaraju da Alumis INC. adquiriu 588.235 ações ordinárias no valor de US$ 9,9 milhões a US$ 17,0 cada. Atualmente, as ações estão sendo negociadas com um prêmio de 30% e subiram 36% na última semana. A empresa também realizou uma oferta pública ampliada de US$ 345,1 milhões e recebeu feedback positivo de analistas após ensaios bem-sucedidos da Fase III para seu medicamento Envudeucitinib, levando a aumentos nos preços-alvo por Guggenheim e Oppenheimer.
feed.source: Investing.com Brasil - Finanças, Câmbio e Investimentos
feed.source_domain: Investing.com Brasil - Finanças, Câmbio e Investimentos

feed.title: Stock Yards Bancorp Inc. meldet Ergebnisse für das am 31. März abgeschlossene Quartal - Earnings Summary
feed.summary: Stock Yards Bancorp Inc. (SYBT) reported a Q1 adjusted earnings per share of $1.13, exceeding the average analyst estimate of $0.99. The company's revenue rose by 12.2% to $93.55 million, also surpassing analyst expectations. Despite a 3.4% stock increase in the quarter, year-to-date performance shows a 0.3% loss, with analysts holding a "Hold" rating and a 12-month price target of $76.50.

feed.title: Majalya of Trinet group sells $47941 in shares
feed.summary: Majalya Sidney A., SVP of Trinet Group (NASDAQ:TNET), sold 775 shares of common stock for $47,941 on January 9, 2026. This transaction was part of a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. The company also recently reported strong Q3 2025 earnings, surpassing revenue and EPS expectations, and declared a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Is Zai Lab (ZLAB) Offering Value After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: This article analyzes Zai Lab's (ZLAB) valuation after a period of significant share price decline. Using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis, Simply Wall St suggests Zai Lab is currently undervalued by 83.0%, with an intrinsic value of $110.09 per share compared to its current price of $18.72. However, a Price to Sales (P/S) ratio of 4.71x against a "Fair Ratio" of 3.91x indicates it might be somewhat overvalued on that metric, urging a nuanced view of its investment potential.

feed.title: Allstate CEO Wilson sells $3.49 million in stock
feed.summary: Allstate Corp CEO Thomas J. Wilson sold $3.49 million worth of company stock across multiple transactions on January 12, 2026, executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following these sales, Wilson directly owns over 94,000 shares. The divestment comes amid recent analyst downgrades for Allstate due to deteriorating fundamentals in the auto insurance sector, including soft Q4 earnings and competitive market conditions.

feed.title: Krauss (TKO Group Holdings) sells $1.14 million in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Seth D. Krauss, Chief Administrative Officer at TKO Group Holdings Inc, sold 5,712 shares of Class A Common Stock for over $1.14 million on January 9, 2026, under a pre-arranged trading plan. This transaction leaves him with 2,271 directly owned shares. The sale comes amidst other company news, including updated analyst ratings and positive outlooks for TKO Group Holdings.

feed.title: Exxon Baton Rouge, Louisiana refinery preparing to run Venezuelan oil, sources say
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil is reportedly preparing to process Venezuelan crude oil at its Baton Rouge, Louisiana refinery. This would mark a resumption of operations with Venezuelan heavy sour crude, which the 522,500 barrel-per-day refinery had ceased using since sanctions were imposed on Venezuela. An Exxon spokesperson has not yet commented on the matter.

feed.title: Amcor plc: How a Quiet Packaging Giant Is Re?engineering the Future of Consumer Goods
feed.summary: Amcor plc is transforming the packaging industry by focusing on sustainable, functional, and globally consistent solutions for consumer goods. The company is innovating with recyclable materials, lightweight designs, and digital features to meet growing demands for efficiency and environmental responsibility. This strategic shift positions Amcor as a technology and innovation platform, offering a competitive edge through sustainability at scale, design excellence, ecosystem integration, and total cost of ownership benefits, which in turn influences its stock valuation.

feed.title: IGT expands Hendrickson’s role to chief product & technology officer
feed.summary: International Game Technology Plc (IGT) has expanded Andy Hendrickson's role to chief product and technology officer (CPTO), pending regulatory approvals. Mr. Hendrickson, who joined IGT in 2025 as CTO, will align product development and processes, leveraging global talent for growth and innovation. He previously served as CTO for Aristocrat Leisure Ltd and Activision Publishing Inc.

feed.title: The Dayton Power and Light Company (d/b/a AES Ohio) Announces Extension of its Registered Exchange Offer
feed.summary: AES Ohio has extended the expiration date of its exchange offer for its 4.550% First Mortgage Bonds due 2030 to January 20, 2026. The exchange allows holders of previously privately placed bonds to swap them for registered bonds with identical terms, removing transfer restrictions. To date, approximately $374,805,000 of the $375,000,000 outstanding Old Bonds have been tendered.
